Title: Route Guard — Enable=false blocks /loyalty-catalog (404)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
Loyalty settings for store {{STORE_ID}}: Enable=false (any Mode; any Currency). Settings pre-configured via LOY-019/LOY-022 pattern.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/loyalty-catalog
[WAIT] page load completes
Assertions:
[NAV] URL does NOT stay at /loyalty-catalog — either remains with 404 UI OR redirected to not-found page
[DOM] page shows 'not found' content or 404-equivalent UI; NOT loyalty catalog product grid
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] no products or category query fired for loyalty catalog namespace
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; products grid renders (guard bypass)
Cleanup: Restore Enable=true via PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/loyalty-setting if modified

Title: PDP reached from loyalty catalog — price shows LOYALTY currency (PTS), not USD (PR #2296 PDP-currency wiring shipped)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
Loyalty settings: Enable=true; Mode='Mixed Cart'; Currency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code). Default store currency is {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD). NOTE: verified live 2026-05-29 on theme 2.50.0-pr-2296 — PR #2296 PDP-currency wiring HAS shipped, so the loyalty PDP shows PTS (it does NOT revert to USD). Listing AND PDP are PTS; only cart/checkout revert to store USD (LOYF-025). This supersedes the earlier project_loyalty_catalog_currency_scope 'PDP reverts to USD' assumption.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/loyalty-catalog
[WAIT] product grid loaded with at least 1 product card
[ACT] click first product card
[WAIT] PDP loads
[ACT] snapshot PDP price area (main price display)
Assertions:
[DOM] PDP renders a numeric price value — product is purchasable (price not zero/absent)
[DOM] PDP price currency shows @td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) (PTS) — NOT default store {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD)
[NOTE] PTS on PDP is current live behavior in theme 2.50.0-pr-2296 (PR #2296 PDP-currency wiring shipped); do NOT file a bug for PTS on PDP
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GetProduct GraphQL query fires with currencyCode=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) (PTS) and the product price response formattedAmount is in PTS — verified live 2026-05-29
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on product detail request
Failure_Signals: PDP shows no price at all (price missing); PDP 404; JS error on PDP load; PDP price reverts to store USD (would indicate PR #2296 wiring rolled back — re-baseline)

Title: Cart shows default store currency (USD) after adding a loyalty catalog product — by-design
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ACME_BUYER]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Loyalty settings: Enable=true; Mode='Mixed Cart'; Currency=@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code). Default store currency {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD). NOTE: cart reverts to USD per project_loyalty_catalog_currency_scope caveat — by-design. A product in the loyalty catalog must be purchasable (in-stock, has USD price).
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/loyalty-catalog
[WAIT] product grid loaded with at least 1 product card
[ACT] click first product card
[WAIT] PDP loads; price visible
[ACT] click '+' (increase quantity / Add to Cart) to add the product to cart
[WAIT] cart icon badge increments OR toast notification appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with at least 1 item
Assertions:
[DOM] cart line item price displays in {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD) — NOT loyalty currency (@td(LOYALTY_SETTINGS.currency_code) / PTS)
[DOM] cart subtotal and totals display in {{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD)
[STATE] product appears in cart (line item visible with product name and USD price)
[NOTE] USD in cart is by-design in theme 2.50.0-pr-2296 — do NOT file a bug for USD in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query on /graphql returns items with extendedPrice.currency.code={{CURRENCY_CODE}} (USD)
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on addItem or cart query
Failure_Signals: Cart shows PTS prices (loyalty currency leaked to cart — that WOULD be a bug); cart empty (addItem silently no-oped); JS error on cart page load
Cleanup: Remove added item from cart (removeCartItem mutation or UI); sign out
